policy.entry: Eligible Daily signals enter at the next trading day's open.
policy.default_exit: Stop -8%, profit lock 15/7, trend fail below SMA20, or max hold 10 trading days.
policy.benchmark: Benchmark lots enter on accepted portfolio entries and exit on the same portfolio exit dates, without hidden leverage.

summary.note: Trade only · 10% cash allocation · stop -8% · profit lock 15/7 · max hold 10D
